channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Rep. Jason Smith: Congress Must Fix Social Security
item.description: The chairman of the House Ways and Means Committee stated Wednesday that Congress needs to take immediate action to prevent a projected shortfall in Social Security's primary funding.

item.title: THE ESSEX FILES: Faith Under Fire: Why America's Churches Are Turning Into Armed Fortresses
Europeans Fall in Love With America While Touring the Country; Americans Need to Take Lessons
Missouri senator warns Dem immigration policies threaten Western civilization after scoring ICE funding win
item.description: Senator Schmitt cautions that Democratic immigration policies endanger Western civilization, following his successful push for a $350 million ICE funding measure targeting sanctuary cities.
